name: Implement a Min-Heap
description:
Implement a min-heap data structure from scratch that supports the following operations:
- insert(val): Insert a value into the heap.
- extractMin(): Remove and return the minimum element.
- peek(): Return the minimum element without removing it.
- size(): Return the number of elements in the heap.
Do not use any built-in heap/priority queue library.

examples.input: insert(3), insert(1), insert(2), peek(), extractMin(), peek()
insert(5), insert(3), insert(8), insert(1), extractMin(), extractMin()

constraints: 1 <= val <= 10^5. extractMin and peek are only called when heap is non-empty. At most 10^4 operations.

performance.stress_intent: exercise long heap-operation traces that punish linear minimum scans and repeated array resorting
